subject: feat(icon): redesign app icon from fuel drop to fuel gauge motif
body:
Replace the old fuel-drop-with-R icon with a minimal fuel gauge design:
semicircle arc, needle pointing to "full", and center pivot dot — all white
on teal (#0D9488). The gauge motif is universally recognized and reads well
from 1024px down to 48px favicon. Also synced CLAUDE.md with external
shared standards (400 DPI, shape-rendering, Key Lessons, PWA icon guidance).

Tags: icon, design, branding, documentation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: app-icon
Semver: patch
